metric_notes.feature_to_expert_purity: For each feature value, fraction covered by its dominant expert.
metric_notes.expert_to_feature_purity: For each expert, fraction covered by its dominant feature value.
metric_notes.same_feature_same_expert_rate: Pairwise probability that two tokens with the same feature share expert.
metric_notes.feature_expert_nmi: Normalized MI between feature id and expert id; robust against trivial purity inflation.
